SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-19-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YING, LEI LEI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ RIVERA, HAROLD V LARRY'S TOWING, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
